{
  Item1:
//! This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
//! Structure: Conditional
#![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
#![allow(unused_parens)]
#![allow(missing_docs)]
#![allow(unused_imports)]
#![allow(unused_variables)]
#![allow(unused_unsafe)]
use std::ptr;

fn UnitAt(value: &str, offset: i32) -> u32 {
    let bytes = value.as_bytes();
    let index = if offset >= 0 { offset as usize } else { bytes.len().wrapping_add(offset as usize) };
    bytes[index] as u32
}

fn Length(value: &str) -> i32 { value.len() as i32 }


pub struct MyData;
impl MyData {

    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: &str) -> bool {
        let mut length: i32;
        let mut unitAtNeg1: u32;
        let mut unitAt0: u32;
        length = Length(key);
        if ((length > 5))
        {
         return false;
        }

        unitAtNeg1 = UnitAt(key, -1);
        if ((unitAtNeg1 > 50))
        {
         return false;
        }

        unitAt0 = UnitAt(key, 0);
        if ((unitAt0 > 116))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((unitAt0 < 116))
        {
         return false;
        }


        if key == "test1" || key == "test2" {
            return true;
        }

        false
    }

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 2;
    pub const MIN_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 5;
    pub const MAX_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 5;
    pub const HAS_NUMBER: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_UPPERCASE: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_LOWERCASE: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_SYMBOL: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_WHITESPACE: bool = false;
}
,
  Item2: 
}
